name: Milestone
based_on: Bankrate / Investor.gov savings goal calculator — compute the monthly contribution to hit a goal by a date, with compound interest growth visualized.
summary: A savings-goal calculator that takes your target amount, deadline, starting balance, and interest rate, then tells you exactly how much to set aside each month and draws a compound-growth chart showing how contributions and interest stack up to the goal.
sections: Goal inputs (target amount, target date, starting balance, expected annual rate)
Headline result: required monthly contribution (and per-week breakdown)
Compound-growth area chart toward the goal line
Scenario sliders (change rate, deadline, or monthly amount to see the goal date move)
setup_questions: What are you saving for and how much do you need (e.g. $20,000 for a house down payment)?
By when do you want to reach it, and how much do you already have saved?
What annual interest/return rate should we assume (e.g. 4% HYSA, 7% investments)?
Currency and a name/title for the goal to show on the page?
photo_terms: glass jar full of coins savings plant growing
piggy bank on desk with calculator
couple planning finances laptop at home
stack of coins increasing growth chart
